---
title: lobster analysis
Author: Michelle Stern
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
```


```{r}
lobster_traps <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Trap_Counts_All_Years_20210519.csv"))
    janitor::clean_names()
```
